description_long: This object consists of three wooden storage crates, two of which are natural wood color and one is painted black. The crates are reinforced with visible metal fasteners at the corners and have a simple, boxy construction. The two natural wood crates feature warning labels: one reads 'DANGER WILD ANIMAL' and the other 'CAUTION KEEP OUT', suggesting they are used for secure or hazardous storage. The black crate is plain, with no visible signage or openings. The surfaces of the crates are textured to resemble rough, unfinished wood, and the boxes appear sturdy and stackable. The overall appearance suggests these crates are suitable for use in urban environments such as warehouses, alleys, or construction sites.
description: A group of three sturdy wooden storage crates, two with warning labels and one painted black, featuring rough wood textures and reinforced corners.
description_view_0: Front view of the black crate stacked above two natural wood crates, showing the plain face of the black crate and the side of one wood crate.
description_view_1: Front view of the two labeled wood crates with the black crate on top, clearly displaying the 'DANGER WILD ANIMAL' and 'CAUTION KEEP OUT' signs.
description_view_2: Side view showing the plain sides of the crates, with the black crate on top and the wood crates below, no labels visible.
description_view_3: Rear view of the crates, showing the backs of the two wood crates and the black crate on top, all without labels.
